CVE-2017-9937.title: In LibTIFF 4.0.8, there is a memory malloc failure in tif_jbig.c. ...
CVE-2017-9937.summary: In LibTIFF 4.0.8, there is a memory malloc failure in tif_jbig.c. A crafted TIFF document can lead to an abort resulting in a remote denial of service attack.

CVE-2022-1210.title: A vulnerability classified as problematic was found in LibTIFF 4. ...
CVE-2022-1210.summary: A vulnerability classified as problematic was found in LibTIFF 4.3.0. Affected by this vulnerability is the TIFF File Handler of tiff2ps. Opening a malicious file leads to a denial of service. The attack can be launched remotely but requires user interaction. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
